ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the electronic component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the component */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the component was added to the database */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for the component */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the datasheet for the component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the component information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the testing condition */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the testing condition */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the testing condition */,
  "units_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the units of measurement for the testing condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_conditions_units_id FOREIGN KEY ("units_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., V, µs) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a base unit */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding changes or updates */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, tester, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value recorded during testing */,
  "verdict" TEXT /* Verdict of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations during the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter causing the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold breach) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers the alert */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)
